title: 10 best herbal creams for nose bleeding
description: Peppermint creams helps with nose bleeding because of its natural ability to constrict blood vessels. The menthol content in peppermint stimulates the nasal passages, causing the blood vessels to narrow and slow down bleeding. This constriction also helps to reduce inflammation and swelling, further alleviating the discomfort caused by a nosebleed. As the blood flow is restricted, the bleeding slows down and eventually stops, providing relief from the distressing situation....
